title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Tata Motors

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Tata Motors
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Motors in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Motors:
Tata Motors is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
